calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration [Code Civ. Proc. 1281]
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Petitioner's verified petition for order compelling arbitration.

Appearances (via Zoom):

Aaron Jackson, Esq., JACKSON LAW GROUP, P.C., (415) 379-0560, for Petitioner.

No other appearances.

Not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Petitioner's unopposed "verified petition for order compelling arbitration" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration [Code Civ. Proc. 1281]
Off Calendar Aug-21-2023 Continued To Oct-10-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance (via ZOOM videoconference);
Aaron Jackson, Esq. of Jackson Law Group, Tel:415.379.0560, for petitioner;
No other appearance.

Counsel for Petitioner Boehlke Sparrer Communications informs the court that it was unable to serve notice on Respondent before the hearing and requested that the hearing be continued.

PETITIONER BOEHLKE SPARRER COMMUNICAITONS, INC.'s Verified Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration [Code Civ. Proc. 1281] is continued to October 10, 2023. Petitioner to give notice of the new hearing date.

Judge: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)
